tasks.step: T1.1: Add gbrain field to Agent interface and registry
tasks.notes: Added gbrain?: boolean to Agent interface

tasks.step: T1.2: Add gbrain to register_member and update_member schemas
tasks.notes: Added gbrain to register/update/list/detail tools

tasks.step: T1.3: Create gbrain MCP client service
tasks.notes: Singleton MCP client service with lazy reconnect

tasks.step: T1.4: Tests for Phase 1
tasks.notes: 13 client tests + 11 config tests (incl. 6 listMembers/memberDetail display tests), all passing

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 1 — gbrain client service + config
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. tsc --noEmit clean, vitest 1242/1242 pass. Phase 1 code review APPROVED.

tasks.step: T2.0: Create shared gbrain helpers
tasks.notes: assertGbrainEnabled returns error string or null; callGbrainTool wraps gbrainClient with error normalization

tasks.step: T2.1: Create brain_query fleet tool
tasks.notes: brain_query tool with memberIdentifier + query + optional collection; registered in index.ts

tasks.step: T2.2: Create brain_write fleet tool
tasks.notes: brain_write tool with memberIdentifier + content + optional collection/metadata; registered in index.ts

tasks.step: T2.3: Tests for brain query/write tools
tasks.notes: 11 tests: happy paths, gbrain disabled, member not found, gbrain unavailable — all passing

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Brain query/write tools
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. tsc clean, 1259 tests passing. brain_query + brain_write + helpers all verified.

tasks.step: T3.1: Create code analysis fleet tools
tasks.notes: code_def, code_refs, code_callers, code_callees — all registered in index.ts

tasks.step: T3.2: Tests for code analysis tools
tasks.notes: 11 tests: happy path x4, gbrain disabled x4, member not found x3 — all green

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 3 — Code analysis tools
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. Minor note: code_callers missing not-found test (non-blocking).

tasks.step: T4.1: Create Minions job queue tools
tasks.notes: jobs_submit, jobs_list, jobs_stats, jobs_work — all registered in index.ts

tasks.step: T4.2: Tests for Minions tools
tasks.notes: 15 tests: happy path x4, gbrain disabled, member not found, unavailable — all green

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 4 — Minions integration
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. All 6 criteria passed.

tasks.step: T5.1: Update reviewer template with conditional brain instructions
tasks.notes: Added Brain-Aware Review section to tpl-reviewer.md

tasks.step: T5.2: Create course correction capture service
tasks.notes: captureCorrection + recallCorrections, silent no-ops when gbrain unavailable

tasks.step: T5.3: Create course_correction fleet tools
tasks.notes: course_correction_capture + course_correction_recall registered in index.ts

tasks.step: T5.4: Wire course_correction_capture into PM sprint flow
tasks.notes: Documented call-sites in single-pair-sprint.md and doer-reviewer.md

tasks.step: T5.5: Tests for Phase 5
tasks.notes: 6 tests: captureCorrection, recallCorrections, no-op cases, tool routing — all passing

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 5 — Reviewer template + course correction
tasks.notes: APPROVED by fleet-reviewer. All 6 criteria passed. No injection risk.

tasks.step: T6.1: DRY audit of gbrain helpers
tasks.notes: All 10 gbrain tools use assertGbrainEnabled + callGbrainTool from helpers. course-correction correctly skips assertGbrainEnabled (intentionally global). No fixes needed.

tasks.step: T6.2: Wire gbrain client lifecycle into server startup/shutdown
tasks.notes: All 12 tools verified in index.ts. Added gracefulShutdown with getGbrainClient().disconnect() on SIGINT/SIGTERM. Lazy init confirmed — callTool connects on first use.

tasks.step: T6.3: Documentation
tasks.notes: Added '## gbrain Integration' section to README: installation, per-member opt-in, 12 tools table, routing guidance, PGLite vs Postgres, reviewer workflow.

tasks.step: T6.4: Final integration tests
tasks.notes: 13 tests: all 12 tools registered, gbrain unavailable errors, existing tools unaffected, registry round-trip, schema overhead < 50% and < 20KB.

tasks.step: T6.5: Comparative test — gbrain vs no-gbrain mode
tasks.notes: 13 tests: with-gbrain full workflow (brain/code/jobs/course-correction), without-gbrain actionable errors with update_member guidance, side-by-side comparison.

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 6 — Documentation + integration
tasks.notes: tsc clean. 1317 tests pass (2 pre-existing timezone failures in time-utils.test.ts unrelated to gbrain). All 12 gbrain tools delivered. Phase 6 complete.
